y: Making choices about activities builds our independence.
Choosing what we enjoy helps us learn about our own interests.
Having choice in our activities makes learning more fun.
eg: We point to or move towards the activity we want to do.
We choose between two options at free play time.
We return to a favourite activity again and again.
We use a choice board to select our next activity.
We show excitement when offered our preferred option.
We communicate our choice using words, signs or pictures.
